mapper.select:
select a.position_id, a.position_name, a.position_desc from po_position a
AND (a.position_name LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%',#{positionQo.keyword}),'%') OR a.position_desc LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%',#{positionQo.keyword}),'%'))
AND a.is_digital_position = 0

select a.user_id, a.user_code, a.user_name, a.phone, a.user_number, b.position_id,
ARRAY_TO_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(b.org_id), ',') orgIds, ARRAY_TO_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT b.user_type), ',') userTypes
GROUP_CONCAT(b.org_id) orgIds, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT b.user_type) userTypes
from po_users a join po_users_organization b on a.user_id = b.user_id
and a.state != 'X'
AND (a.user_name LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%',#{positionUsersQo.keyword}),'%') OR a.phone LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%',#{positionUsersQo.keyword}),'%') OR a.user_number LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%',#{positionUsersQo.keyword}),'%'))
AND b.position_id =#{positionUsersQo.positionId}
AND b.user_type =#{positionUsersQo.userType}
group by a.user_id, a.user_code, a.user_name, a.phone, a.user_number, b.position_id
SELECT count(1) FROM po_users_organization a JOIN po_position b on a.position_id = b.position_id WHERE a.position_id = #{positionId} AND b.is_digital_position = 0

SELECT a.position_id, a.position_name, a.position_desc, c.user_name AS header_name FROM po_position a JOIN po_users_organization b ON a.position_id = b.position_id LEFT JOIN po_users_organization d ON b.org_id = d.org_id AND d.user_type = 'ORG_MAN' LEFT JOIN po_users c ON d.user_id = c.user_id WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} AND a.is_digital_position = 0
